release_notes: V14.44 build 215 beta applies the selected 4/6/8/10/12-hour trend window immediately when the Web UI Trend button is used, replaces remaining hard-coded 4-hour screen text with the selected window, and makes the Sensor Data screen return the browser to the dashboard before TFT drawing. The Sensor data Web UI is simplified into Auto and Manual conditional panels, and Local address setup is moved above Device name in a prominent red-bordered panel. Current status now shows the active .local address in a full-width responsive green card that wraps and auto-sizes. All B214 leah.local defaults, B213 setup-password display, B212 native OTA safeguards and existing Nightscout, SAGE, IOB/COB, alarm and WhatsApp functions are preserved.
